---
title: "Minimal"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Minimal}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r}
library(lucasalloin)
```

<!-- WARNING - This vignette is generated by {fusen} from dev/flat_bonjour.Rmd: do not edit by hand -->



<!--
 You need to run the 'description' chunk in the '0-dev_history.Rmd' file before continuing your code there.
-->

# dire_bonjour


```{r examples-bonjour}
dire_bonjour(prenom = "Vincent")
dire_bonjour()
```
